message:
test(integration): use mpsc_send compat helper in resize_watchdog test

Replaces the dual #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")] / #[cfg(not(...))]
blocks for sending on the shutdown channel with the unified mpsc_send()
helper from runtime_compat. This mirrors the pattern used in production
code and eliminates 8 lines of cfg-gated boilerplate in the IPC status
integration test.

The mpsc_send helper was already available in runtime_compat but this test
was still using the raw cfg-dispatched approach. Now consistent with the
rest of the codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
